kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: 15 coins goes with neither Beatrix nor Eastcheap.

More members of the Clothiers' Guild are in the North Side than members of the Ironmongers' Guild.
Exactly one of these is true: Cedric goes with Oldwall; Godfrey goes with Highrow; Cooper goes with 15 coins.
Rowan, Oldwall, and 19 coins go with Blacksmith, Cooper, and Fletcher, in some order.
Blacksmith does not go with Rowan if and only if Oldwall goes with Tanner.
Exactly one of Aldric and the Tanner belongs to the River Ward.

Either 13 coins goes with Beatrix or someone in the North Side goes with Beatrix (but not both).
Cedric, Matilda, and Fletcher go with 11 coins, 19 coins, and 21 coins, in some order.
Matilda's levy is higher than both the Blacksmith and the artisan in Kingsford.
Beatrix goes with exactly two of Mason, Kingsford, and 13 coins.
